input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.11.4.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.11.4.4
            TITLE: segments/cells inside the transport container must agree with the voltage and energy limits

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.11.4.4: Segments/Cells inside the Transport Container must agree with the voltage and energy limits
EV.11.4.4 Segments/Cells inside the Transport Container must agree with the voltage and energy limits 
of EV.5.1.2

final_answer: Segments/Cells inside the Transport Container must agree with the voltage and energy limits of EV.5.1.2
